news.title: ICICI Bank mulls first benchmark dollar bond sale since 2017
news.description: ICICI Bank is planning its first benchmark US dollar bond sale since 2017, aiming to raise at least $500 million through offshore bonds. The proposed issuance comes after the RBI introduced a concessional foreign exchange swap facility, encouraging Indian lenders to tap overseas markets for funding.

news.title: Russian Missile Attack on Kyiv Kills at Least 10, Injures Dozens
news.description: Russia unleashed one of the most intense missile and drone attacks on Kyiv so far this year, killing at least 10 people and injuring dozens, according to Ukrainian officials.

news.title: Oil falls for a third day in a row as US, Iran talks end
news.description: Oil prices dropped about 1% today, down for a third consecutive day, after Qatar said Iran and the US had made progress in indirect talks focused on the Strait of Hormuz, which handled one-fifth of global oil supply before the war.
